exchanges.prompt: Design a multi-cloud architecture using AWS S3 for storage, Azure Functions for compute, and GCP BigQuery for analytics with a Kubernetes orchestration layer

response.content:
graph TD
    subgraph External Entities
        User[User] -->|Request| Load_Balancer(Load Balancer)
        Load_Balancer -->|Request| Kubernetes_Cluster(Kubernetes Cluster)
    end
    subgraph Kubernetes Cluster
        Kubernetes_Cluster -->|Orchestration| AWS_S3(AWS S3)
        Kubernetes_Cluster -->|Orchestration| Azure_Functions(Azure Functions)
        Kubernetes_Cluster -->|Orchestration| GCP_BigQuery(GCP BigQuery)
    end
    subgraph Cloud Services
        AWS_S3 -->|Data Storage| Data_Store_1{Data Store 1}
        Azure_Functions -->|Compute| Process_1.0[Process 1.0]
        GCP_BigQuery -->|Analytics| Data_Warehouse_1{Data Warehouse 1}
        Process_1.0 -->|Data Processing| Data_Warehouse_1
        Data_Store_1 -->|Data Retrieval| Process_1.0
    end
    subgraph Data Flows
        User -->|User Input| Load_Balancer
        Load_Balancer -->|Request| Kubernetes_Cluster
        Kubernetes_Cluster -->|Container Orchestration| Azure_Functions
        Azure_Functions -->|Compute Output| GCP_BigQuery
        GCP_BigQuery -->|Analytics Output| User
        AWS_S3 -->|Data| Azure_Functions
    end
